meta.title: AlgoSu — Algorithm Study Platform
meta.description: From problem solving to GitHub sync and AI code analysis. Grow systematically with your team.

hero.subtitleLine1: From problem solving to GitHub sync and AI code analysis.

aiAnalysis.title: AI Code Analysis
aiAnalysis.description: AI automatically analyzes your submissions — efficiency, readability, accuracy scores with detailed feedback.

githubSync.title: GitHub Auto-Sync
githubSync.description: Auto-commit submissions to your GitHub repo. Build your portfolio naturally.

studyCollab.title: Study Collaboration
studyCollab.description: Solve problems together, compare and review each other's code in a shared growth space.

dashboard.title: Stats Dashboard
dashboard.description: Track your growth at a glance with weekly submissions, difficulty breakdowns, and language stats.

codeReview.title: Code Review
codeReview.description: Compare peers' solutions and review AI analysis together. Learn from each other's code.

progressMgmt.title: Progress Management
progressMgmt.description: Deadlines, submission status, and reminders — manage your study progress systematically.

0.quote: Thanks to AI analysis, my code quality has noticeably improved. It catches patterns I'd never spot on my own.
0.name: Seoyeon Lee

1.quote: The auto GitHub commit is so convenient. I'm naturally hitting my daily commit streak while studying!
1.name: Junseo Park

2.quote: The stats dashboard helped me identify my weak algorithms and focus my practice there.
2.name: Yerin Choi

finalCta.heading: Get Started Today
finalCta.description: From creating a study group to AI analysis — it only takes 5 minutes.
